title: WAF Attack Frequency by Source IP (Frequency Analysis)
description: Identifies source IPs generating the most WAF block events. Uses frequency analysis (Threat Hunter's Cookbook: Sorting/Stacking) to surface prolific attackers targeting the web application. IPs with high block counts indicate automated attack tools.
query: ('Log Source' = 'OCI WAF Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC WAF Security Logs') and 'Action' = 'BLOCK' | stats count as blocked_requests, unique('Rule Key') as rules_triggered, earliest(time) as first_seen, latest(time) as last_seen by 'Client IP' | sort -blocked_requests | where blocked_requests > 10
falsepositives: WAF tuning generating false positive blocks
